mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description, r.status, r.create_time FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 0
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_name, role_code, description, status) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
